full_text:
Zhao Zhong 趙忠
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Zhao Zhong (趙忠)was born in Anping. Emperor Ling considered him as a mother, slandered Huangfu Song, Lu Qiang and Fu Xie. Zhao Zhong was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Zhao Zhong lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
